## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation build and related checks were run.
- [ ] CLI commands use long flags and were actually executed when validation is claimed.
- [ ] No subscription IDs, tenant IDs, object IDs, emails, secrets, or other PII were introduced.
- [ ] Links and source metadata were updated when applicable.
- [ ] Screenshots were visually checked and sanitized when applicable.
